Charles Rabolli

MD/PhD Candidate @ Ohio State University

Medicine | Engineering | Cardiac Research | AI

github linkedin pubmed

About Me

As an MD/PhD candidate at The Ohio State University, I am passionate about bridging the gap between clinical medicine and cutting-edge research. My work combines expertise in medicine, engineering, and artificial intelligence to develop innovative solutions for complex medical challenges.

My research focuses on understanding cardiac disease mechanisms through advanced molecular techniques, particularly in the field of RNA modifications and epitranscriptomics. I am driven by the potential to translate laboratory discoveries into meaningful clinical applications that can improve patient care.

Beyond research, I am deeply committed to innovation in healthcare, having developed several diagnostic tools and participated in entrepreneurial initiatives aimed at bringing new medical technologies to market.

Research Focus

Cardiac Medicine

Advancing our understanding of heart disease through molecular research.

Medical Devices

Engineering innovative diagnostic and therapeutic solutions.

RNA Biology

Investigating RNA modifications in cardiovascular disease.

Research Focus

Bridging clinical medicine and engineering innovation

Clinical Medicine

Advancing patient care through evidence-based medicine and innovative therapeutic approaches in cardiology.

Cardiac Research

Investigating molecular mechanisms of heart disease through RNA biology and epitranscriptomics.

Engineering

Developing novel medical devices and diagnostic platforms for early disease detection and monitoring.

AI in Medicine

Implementing machine learning algorithms for medical image analysis and disease prediction.

Advancing Cardiac Research Through Technology

My research combines cutting-edge molecular biology techniques with advanced computational methods to understand cardiac disease mechanisms. By leveraging AI and machine learning, we're developing innovative approaches to early disease detection and personalized treatment strategies.
